name: Beijing YJK Building Software Co.,Ltd.
summary: Beijing YJK Building Software Co.,Ltd. develops and sells building structure design software and consulting services for the construction industry in China and internationally. It offers an integrated building structure auxiliary design system that comprises YJK-A, a building structure calculation module; YJK-F, a basic design module; YJK-M, a masonry structure design module; YJK-D, a structure construction drawing design module; YJK-STS, a steel structure construction drawing design module; YJK-EP, an elastoplastic dynamic time history analysis module; and an interface module. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Beijing, China.
